scripts.dev: mkdir -p assets/editor && cd source/editor && $npm_execpath run build && cd ../.. && cp source/editor/dist/index.html assets/editor/index.html && expo start -c
scripts.build:development: mkdir -p $HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export TMPDIR=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export GRADLE_OPTS="-Djava.io.tmpdir=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp" && eas build --platform android --profile development --local
scripts.build:preview: mkdir -p $HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export TMPDIR=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export GRADLE_OPTS="-Djava.io.tmpdir=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp" && eas build --platform android --profile preview --local
scripts.build:production: mkdir -p $HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export TMPDIR=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp && export GRADLE_OPTS="-Djava.io.tmpdir=$HOME/.cache/app-build-tmp" && eas build --platform android --profile production --local
scripts.eas-build-pre-install: mkdir -p assets/editor && cd source/editor && $npm_execpath install && $npm_execpath run build && cd ../.. && cp source/editor/dist/index.html assets/editor/index.html
